case_title: KISSI KENYA CARPENTER VS. THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF PLAINTIFF, AMENDING CLAIM TO ADD DEFENDANT "SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL" AND TO DISMISS ORIGINAL DEFENDANT, "THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION" FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 FILED BY CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-17-2018 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AMENDED CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-01-2018, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS: AMANDA HEIER) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AUG-02-2018, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-17-2018 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO NOV-19-2018 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF KISSI KENYA CARPENTER IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY GERRY CHOW, VP, FINANCE. PARTIES CONFERRED PRIOR TO THE HEARING AND DETERMINED THAT DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION IS NOT THE PROPER DEFENDANT IN THIS MATTER. HONORABLE CHRISTINE VAN AKEN ALLOWED PLAINTIFF A CONTINUANCE IN ORDER TO AMEND CLAIM TO PROPERLY REFLECT TRUE DEFENDANT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DISMISSAL WITH PREJUDICE OF CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF **DISMISSAL ONLY AS TO SF GENERAL FOUNDATION** FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA AS TO DEFENDANT THE SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION

AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $450.00 (AMENDED ADDING SF GENERAL HOSPITAL & DISMISSING SF GENERAL HOSPITAL FOUNDATION) FILED BY CARPENTER, KISSI KENYA AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF KISSI KENYA CARPENTER. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO GENERAL HOSPITAL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
